name: fisicahn-android
description: FísicaHN — app Android (Capacitor) del simulador offline

scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync && npx cap sync android
scripts.open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.build:debug: npm run cap:sync && bash scripts/build-apk.sh debug
scripts.build:release: npm run cap:sync && bash scripts/build-apk.sh release
